author: Claude Code
content:
Fixed init.sh silent failure in non-interactive (curl pipe) mode.

Root cause: `set -euo pipefail` + `grep` returning exit code 1 when `.env` exists but has no `PROJECT_SLUG=` line. The pipeline `grep ... | cut ... | tr ...` returns non-zero via pipefail, and `set -e` kills the script before any echo runs.

Fixes:
- Added `|| true` to all piped grep commands in variable assignments (lines 65, 66, 98)
- Added auto-detection of slug from git initials in non-interactive mode
- Added clear error message with usage example when slug can't be determined
- Added final validation that slug is never empty

File changed: `init.sh`
